description_long: This wheelchair features a high, arched backrest and seat constructed from a woven or textured material, framed by a light wood structure. The armrests are straight and wooden, matching the frame, and the footrests are broad, flat, and also made of wood, providing ample support for the user's feet. The wheelchair is equipped with large, spoked rear wheels and smaller front caster wheels, both with visible metal rims and rubber tires. The rear wheels have push rims for manual propulsion, and the frame includes a black metal support structure beneath the seat and around the wheels. The push handles at the back are simple, black, and slightly curved, designed for easy maneuvering by an attendant.
description: A wooden-framed wheelchair with a high backrest, spoked wheels, and broad wooden footrests, featuring push rims and black push handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high arched backrest, broad wooden footrests, and the full width of the seat and armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the spoked rear wheel, small front caster, and the profile of the wooden frame and footrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest, black push handles, and the rear frame structure.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the spoked wheel, caster, and the side profile of the frame and footrests.
attribute_wheel_type: Spoked wheels; two large rear wheels with metal spokes and rubber tires, two smaller front caster wheels.
attribute_frame_design: Rigid frame with straight wooden tubing, reinforced by black metal cross-braces and support bars.
attribute_footrest_style: Fixed, broad wooden footrests with a rectangular shape, positioned side by side.
attribute_handlebar_configuration: Standard black push handles, straight with a slight upward curve, positioned at the top rear of the backrest.
